title: CS CINEMATIC
description: Advanced Minecraft camera plugin featuring unlimited positions, smooth animations, sound effects, screen shake, zoom, teleportation, and YAML-based editable cinematic files.
body:
# 🎬 CS Cinematic | Advanced Camera System
**Version: 2.0.0 | Minecraft: 1.21+**

Transform your Minecraft server with **CS Cinematic**, the ultimate tool for creating professional, smooth, and immersive camera sequences. Whether you are building a server lobby intro, a story-driven RPG cutscene, or a map trailer, CS Cinematic handles it all without requiring any client-side mods!

---

## ✨ Key Features

**📍 Unlimited Camera Positions**
Create complex camera paths with as many keyframes (positions) as you need. There is no limit to how long or detailed your cinematic can be.

**🎥 Butter-Smooth Movement**
Forget choppy teleportation! CS Cinematic uses advanced math (interpolation) to glide the player's camera smoothly between points.
*   **8 Interpolation Types:** Linear, Ease-In, Ease-Out, Smooth, Bounce, Elastic, and more.

**📝 Fully Editable YAML Files**
Every cinematic you save creates a file in `plugins/CSCinematic/cinematics/`.
*   You can edit coordinates, speed, text, and sounds manually in the file.
*   Easy to share cinematics between servers.

**🎵 Advanced Sound System**
*   **900+ Sounds:** Built-in tab completion for every Minecraft sound.
*   **Custom Sounds:** Support for resource pack sounds.
*   **Timing:** Play sounds at specific positions or global timestamps.

**💥 Immersive Visual Effects**
*   **Screen Shake:** Add intensity to explosions or dramatic moments.
*   **Zoom & FOV:** Dynamically change the Field of View for dramatic close-ups.
*   **Comedy Mode:** One command to enable fast cuts, funny shakes, and zoom effects.

**💬 Titles & Text Overlays**
Display clear titles and subtitles synced perfectly with the camera movement. Customize fade-in, stay, and fade-out times.

**⚡ Smart Player Handling**
*   **Spectator Mode:** Players are automatically switched to Spectator mode.
*   **Input Blocking:** Movement, chat, and interactions are blocked during the show.
*   **State Restoration:** When the cinematic ends, the player is returned to their original location, gamemode, and inventory exactly as they were.

---

## 🛠️ How It Works

CS Cinematic is designed to be intuitive. You don't need complex coding knowledge.

1.  **Create:** `/cs create <name>` to start a recording session.
2.  **Position:** Fly to a spot and type `/cs pos add`.
3.  **Customize:** Add a specific speed or delay: `/cs pos add 3.0 5.0`.
4.  **Spice it up:** Add a sound or text: `/cs text 1 "Welcome!"`.
5.  **Save:** `/cs save` writes everything to a file.
6.  **Play:** `/cs play <name>` to watch your masterpiece.

---

## 🎮 Command List

| Command | Description |
| :--- | :--- |
| `/cs create <name>` | Create a new cinematic. |
| `/cs edit <name>` | Edit an existing cinematic. |
| `/cs pos add` | Add a camera point at your location. |
| `/cs pos list` | View all positions. |
| `/cs sound <id> <sound>` | Add a sound effect to a position. |
| `/cs text <id> <text>` | Add a title to a position. |
| `/cs shake <id> <amount>` | Add screen shake effect. |
| `/cs play <name>` | Play the cinematic for yourself. |
| `/cs play <name> <player>` | Force a player to watch. |
| `/cs save` | Save your work to YAML. |
| `/cs load <name>` | Load changes made in YAML files. |

---

## 📂 Configuration

The plugin is highly configurable via `config.yml`. You can set default speeds, delays, and message prefixes.

**Data Folder:** `plugins/CSCinematic/cinematics/`
*   Each cinematic gets its own `.yml` file.
*   You can copy/paste these files to back them up or share them.

---

## 🚀 Why Choose CS Cinematic?

*   **Optimized:** Lag-free performance even on 1.21+ servers.
*   **User Friendly:** Tab-completion for all commands and sounds.
*   **Professional:** Creates movie-quality transitions.
*   **Free:** Full features with no paywalls.
